newmoon.title: New Moon Soul
newmoon.desc: You are wired for fresh starts. Restless, visionary, and magnetically drawn to the unknown — you shed old skins like it's nothing.
newmoon.advice: Your ability to start over is rare. But some things deserve to be stayed with. Not every discomfort means it's time to leave.
youProbably: Have reinvented yourself at least 3 times
Get excited by blank pages more than finished books
Move cities, change careers, or cut your hair when restless
See potential in everything — including people who haven't earned it yet

waxing.title: Waxing Moon Soul
waxing.desc: You're in growth mode — always. Disciplined, focused, and quietly ambitious, you plant seeds others don't see until they bloom.
waxing.advice: Your patience will pay off. But don't forget to enjoy the in-between. The climb is the story, not just the summit.
youProbably: Have a 5-year plan and a daily routine
Push through when others give up
Underestimate how far you've already come

fullmoon.title: Full Moon Soul
fullmoon.tagline: the one who feels it all
fullmoon.desc: You live at full intensity. Emotional, expressive, and impossible to ignore — when you walk in, the room shifts.
fullmoon.advice: Your fullness is your gift. But not every feeling needs to be acted on. Sometimes power is in the pause.
youProbably: Have main character energy without trying
Love and fight with equal intensity
Are either everyone's favorite or too much for some
Can't hide your emotions even when you want to

waning.title: Waning Moon Soul
waning.desc: You carry wisdom beyond your years. Reflective, intuitive, and quietly powerful — you understand that endings are just beginnings in disguise.
waning.advice: Your depth is magnetic. But don't get so comfortable in the shadows that you forget to step into the light when it's your turn.
youProbably: Give advice that sounds like it came from a therapist
Need alone time like you need oxygen
Have already forgiven things others are still angry about
